Documentation of counter registers

This document is a specification for the register interface of the FPGA module counter.

This file is automatically generated by hdl-registers version 8.1.0. Code generator HtmlPageGenerator version 1.0.0. Generated 2026-03-12 13:16 from file regs_counter.toml at Git commit 47448a42394d (local changes present). Register hash 9f2e9f9fb5bf3815563ea5a3035766ab50f3a8bb.

Register modes

The following register modes are available.

Mode Description

Read

Software can read a value that hardware provides.

Write

Software can write a value that is available for hardware usage.

Read, Write

Software can write a value and read it back. The written value is available for hardware usage.

Write-pulse

Software can write a value that is asserted for one clock cycle in hardware.

Read, Write-pulse

Software can read a value that hardware provides. Software can write a value that is asserted for one clock cycle in hardware.

Registers

The following registers make up the register list.

Name Index Address Mode Default value Description

conf

0

0x0000

Read, Write

0x4

Counter configuration.

  condition

  1:0

clock_cycles

Set mode for how the counter operates.

Can be set to the following values:

  • clock_cycles (0): Increment counter each clock cycle.

  • clock_cycles_with_enable (1): Increment counter when clock_enable is asserted.

  • enable_edges (2): Increment counter each time clock_enable changes state.

  increment

  9:2

1

Step size for each counter increment.

Valid numeric range: [1 – 255].

command

1

0x0004

Write-pulse

0x0

Issue a one-shot command to the counter.

  reset_counter

  0

0b0

Pulse high to reset the counter to zero.

status

2

0x0008

Read

0x0

Current counter status.

  enabled

  0

0b0

Asserted when the counter is actively running.

  pulse_count

  16:1

0b0000000000000000

Number of pulses emitted since last reset.

Constants

This module does not have any constants.
